name: Pineapple Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch square pan.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine the milk, sugar, and pineapple juice. Cook over low heat until it reaches the soft ball stage (238°F on a candy thermometer), stirring constantly to prevent burning.
3. Remove from heat and stir in butter.
4. Allow the mixture to cool in the pan without stirring again.
5. When cool, add the candied pineapple (if using) and lemon juice. Beat until crystallization begins.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and cut into squares.
Makes 64 1-inch squares
